tool.name: RAxML-NG
tool.description: Maximum Likelihood based inference of large phylogenetic trees
tool.command: raxml-ng #if $command == '--bsref': #set command = "--all" #end if $command #if $command == '--consense': $consensus_type #end if #if $command not in ['--support', '--bsconverge', '--rfdist', '--consense']: --msa '$infile' #end if #if $command not in ['--support', '--bsconverge', '--rfdist', '--consense', '--terrace', '--pythia']: #if $model.model_type == 'single_auto': --model '$model.auto_seq_type' #elif $model.model_type == 'single_gui': #if $model.seq_type == 'multistate': #set model_matrix = "MULTI" + str($model.single_model.multi_state_count) + "_" + str($model.single_model.subst_matrix) #elif $model.paml_file: #set model_prefix = "" #if $model.seq_type == 'aminoacid': #set model_prefix = "PROT" #elif $model.seq_type == 'genotype10': #set model_prefix = "GT10" #elif $model.seq_type == 'genotype16': #set model_prefix = "GT16" #end if #set model_matrix = str($model_prefix) + "GTR{" + str($model.paml_file) + "}" #else: #set model_matrix = str($model.single_model.subst_matrix) #end if #if str($model.rhas_model) in ['+G', '+R', '+I+G', '+I+R']: #set model_rhas = str($model.rhas_model) + str($model.rhas_cat_count) #else #set model_rhas = str($model.rhas_model) #end if #if $model.charmap_file: #set model_charmap = "+M{" + str($model.charmap_file) + "}" #else: #set model_charmap = "" #end if --model ${model_matrix}${model.base_freqs}${model_rhas}${model_charmap} #elif $model.model_type == 'single_string' --model '${model.model_string}' #elif $model.model_type == 'multi_file' #set model_file_prefix = "" #if $model.model_file_auto: #set model_file_prefix = $model.model_file_auto #end if --model '${model_file_prefix}${model.model_file}' --brlen $model.brlen_linkage #elif $model.model_type == 'multi_moose' --model '${model.model_file}' #end if #end if #if $command == '--terrace': --model '${part_file}' --force model_overfit #elif $command == '--pythia': --model '${seq_type}' #end if #if $command == '--start': --adaptive off #end if #set start_trees = [] #if $tree_file: #set start_trees = start_trees + [str($tree_file)] #end if #if $tree_pars_count: #set start_trees = start_trees + [ "pars{" + str($tree_pars_count) + "}" ] #end if #if $tree_rand_count: #set start_trees = start_trees + [ "rand{" + str($tree_rand_count) + "}" ] #end if #set tree_str = ','.join($start_trees) #if $tree_str: --tree $tree_str #end if #if $outgroup_name: --outgroup '$outgroup_name' #end if #if $constraint_file: --tree-constraint '$constraint_file' #end if #if $command == '--all' or $command == '--bootstrap': #if $bs_metric --bs-metric $bs_metric #end if #if $bs_mre: --bs-trees autoMRE{$bs_reps} --bs-cutoff $bs_cutoff #else --bs- trees $bs_reps #end if #elif $command == '--support': #if $bs_metric --bs-metric $bs_metric #end if --bs-trees $bs_trees #elif $command == '--bsconverge': --bs-cutoff $bs_cutoff --bs-trees $bs_trees #end if #if $moose.moose_type == 'custom': #set moose_opts = ["criterion=" + str($moose.criterion)] #if $moose.ic_delta: #set moose_opts = moose_opts + ["ic-delta=" + str($moose.ic_delta)] #end if #if $moose.matrix_string: #set moose_opts = moose_opts + ["substitution-models=" + str($moose.matrix_string)] #end if #if $moose.rhas: #set moose_opts = moose_opts + ["rhas=" + str($moose.rhas)] #end if #if $moose.freerate_categories: #set moose_opts = moose_opts + ["freerate-categories=" + str($moose.freerate_categories)] #end if #if $moose.heuristics: #set moose_opts = moose_opts + ["heuristics=" + str($moose.heuristics).lower()] #else #set moose_opts = moose_opts + ["heuristics=off"] #end if #set moose_str = '/'.join($moose_opts) #if $moose_str: --moose-options $moose_str #end if #end if #if $random_seed: --seed $random_seed #end if #if $opt_topology: --opt-topology $opt_topology #end if #if $stop_rule: --stop-rule $stop_rule #end if #if $opt_freerate: --opt-freerate $opt_freerate #end if #if $lh_epsilon: --lh-epsilon $lh_epsilon #end if #if $lh_epsilon_triplet: --lh-epsilon-triplet $lh_epsilon_triplet #end if #if $blmin: --blmin $blmin #end if #if $blmax: --blmax $blmax #end if #if $log_level: --log $log_level #end if #if $precision: --precision $precision #end if $pat_comp $site_repeats $rate_scalers $nofiles #if $force: --force $force #end if $extra_brlen_start_fixed $extra_pars_spr #if $extra_seq_dup: --extra seq-dup-$extra_seq_dup #end if #if $extra_seq_allgap: --extra seq-allgap-$extra_seq_allgap #end if #if $site_weights: --site-weights $site_weights #end if --prefix galaxy --threads auto{\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-8}}

param.name: command
param.label: Analysis type
param.option: START: Generate parsimony and/or random starting trees
ALL: Adaptive ML tree search with branch support
ALLFAST: Simple ML tree search with predicted branch support
EVALUATE: Optimize branches and model parameters on a fixed topology
BSREF: Compute branch support on a fixed reference topology
BSMAP: Map branch support from existing set of bootstrap trees
BSCONVERGE: Test bootstrap convergerge a posteriori
ASR: Ancestral state reconstruction on a given tree
RF: Compute pair-wise Robinson-Foulds distances between trees
TERRACE: Check whether a tree lies on a phylogenetic terrace
PYTHIA: Predict phylogenetic difficulty of an alignment
MUTMAP: Map mutations to the tree branches
MOOSE: Select best-fit model of sequence evolution
EBG: Predict branch support with Educated Bootstrap Guesser

param.name: outgroup_name
param.label: Root a tree: Outgroup taxon name(s)
param.help: E.g. Mouse or Mouse,Rat. No spaces between taxon names are allowed

param.name: constraint_file
param.label: Constraint tree
param.help: Topological constraint in NEWICK format (can be partial)

param.name: extra_pars_spr
param.label: Starting trees: Apply parsimony SPR moves

param.name: extra_brlen_start_fixed
param.label: Starting trees: Use parsimony-based branch length estimate

param.name: bs_cutoff
param.label: Bootstopping cutoff
param.help: Cutoff threshold for the MRE-based convergence test

param.name: ic_delta
param.label: Significance threshold for IC score difference

param.name: matrix_string
param.label: List of substitution matrices to test (comma-separated)

param.name: freerate_categories
param.label: Range of FreeRate categories to test
Number of decimal places to print
Do not create any output files (dry run)

param.name: keep_interim_files
param.label: Keep additional result files
param.option: Multifurcating ML tree (with near-zero branches collapsed)

param.name: extra_seq_dup
param.label: What to do with duplicate sequences?
param.option: KEEP: Report but preserve for the tree search
REGRAFT: Exclude during the search, but re-insert into the final tree

param.name: extra_seq_allgap
param.label: What to do with 'empty' (gap-only) sequences?
param.option: KEEP: Report but preserve for the tree search

param.label: FreeRate optimization method
param.option: Expectation-Maximization (EM) for weights, L-BFGS-B for rates
Expectation-Maximization (EM) for weights, Brent for rates

param.label: Log-likelihood epsilon for tree search and model optimization
Log-likelihood epsilon for branch length triplet optimization

param.name: rate_scalers
param.label: ALWAYS use individual CLV scalers for each rate category
param.help: Default: use if MSA has >2000 taxa

param.label: File with custom MSA column weights (positive integers only!)

data.name: bestTreeCollapsed
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: Best-scoring ML Tree (collapsed)
data.filter: general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] in ["--search", "--fast", "--all", "--allfast", "--evaluate"] and output_opts['keep_interim_files'] and ("bestTreeCollapsed" in output_opts['keep_interim_files'])

data.name: supportTree
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (FBP)

data.name: supportTreeTBE
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (TBE)

data.name: supportTreeEBG
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (EBG)
data.filter: general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] in ["--allfast", "--ebg"] or (general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] in ["--all"] and "ebg" in general_opts['cmdtype']['bs_metric'])

data.name: supportTreeRBS
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (RBS)

data.name: supportTreeSH
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (SH-aLRT)

data.name: supportTreePS
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (PS)

data.name: supportTreePBS
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (PBS)

data.name: supportTreeIC1
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (IC1)

data.name: supportTreeICA
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (ICA)

data.name: supportTreeGCF
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: ML Tree with branch support values (gCF)

data.name: bootstrapTrees
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: Bootstrap trees
data.filter: general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] == "--bootstrap" or (general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] in ["--all"] and output_opts['keep_interim_files'] and "bootstrapTrees" in output_opts['keep_interim_files'])

data.name: startTree
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: Starting trees
data.filter: general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] == "--start" or (general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] in ["--search", "--fast", "--all", "--allfast"] and output_opts['keep_interim_files'] and "startTree" in output_opts['keep_interim_files'])

data.name: mlTrees
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: Per-search ML trees
data.filter: general_opts['cmdtype']['command'] in ["--search", "--all"] and output_opts['keep_interim_files'] and ("mlTrees" in output_opts['keep_interim_files'])

has_text.text: Alignment can be successfully read by RAxML-NG.
Generating 4 random starting tree(s) with 10 taxa
Generating 6 parsimony starting tree(s) with 10 taxa
run mode: Model selection + Tree with branch support (simplified) (Educated Bootstrap Guesser)
run mode: Tree with branch support
Average absolute RF distance in this tree set: 12.

tool.help:
RAxML-NG_ is a phylogenetic tree inference tool which uses Maximum-Likelihood (ML) optimality criterion. Its search heuristic is based on iteratively performing a series of Subtree Pruning and Regrafting (SPR) moves, which allows to quickly navigate to the best-known ML tree.
RAxML-NG_ version 2.0 offers a plethora of new features such as `adaptive search heuristics <https://doi.org/10.1093/molbev/msad227>`_, `automatic model selection <https://codeberg.org/amkozlov/raxml-ng/wiki/Automatic-model-selection-(MOOSE)>`_, and `fast branch support metrics <https://codeberg.org/amkozlov/raxml-ng/wiki/Computing-branch-support-metrics>`_.
RAxML-NG_ is a successor of RAxML 8.x (Stamatakis 2014).
Documentation: https://codeberg.org/amkozlov/raxml-ng/wiki
.. _RAxML-NG: http://raxml.ng/
